description_long: This object is a compact assault rifle with a black metal receiver and a wooden handguard, featuring a folding metal stock. The rifle is accompanied by two detachable curved magazines and several loose rifle cartridges, all placed nearby. The receiver and barrel assembly show signs of wear, with a matte, slightly rough finish, and the wooden handguard has a dark, weathered appearance. The folding stock is skeletonized, made of metal, and designed for portability. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights and a short barrel, ending in a slotted flash hider. The magazines and cartridges are consistent with those used in intermediate-caliber rifles, suggesting a design similar to the AKS-74U or a similar compact carbine.
description: A compact black assault rifle with a wooden handguard, folding metal stock, and two curved magazines with loose cartridges nearby.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full rifle profile, folding stock extended, wooden handguard, and two magazines with cartridges.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, iron sights, and the open end of the barrel, with magazines and cartridges visible to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding stock, wooden handguard, and the arrangement of magazines and cartridges.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the rifle's length, the alignment of the stock, and the placement of magazines and cartridges.
